title: ecc.rs/mldsa.rs: use vec![0u8; n] instead of with_capacity+set_len
description: sign_digest/public_key_der/ecdh/mldsa::sign allocate with Vec::with_capacity(n) then call unsafe set_len(sig_len). If the C function returns rc=0 but writes fewer bytes than sig_len (a C bug), the tail bytes are uninitialized — UB when the caller reads the &[u8]. Fix: vec![0u8; n] instead of with_capacity; then truncate to sig_len. Cost: one small memset; benefit: eliminates UB class even on C implementation bugs.
